Quality Education.reason: Focus on literature and critical analysis supports Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development').
The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity and heritage, contributing to sustainable development education (Target 4.7).

Quality Education.reasoning: The course is a required university-level course, directly contributing to quality tertiary education (Target 4.3).
